---
title: "Study_2_All_Data_MAR"
author: "Spike"
date: "2025-10-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Study 2 Results
## Load Packages
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
library(broom)
library(car)
library(DescTools)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(effectsize)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(lsr)
library(MASS)
library(openxlsx)
library(ordinal)
library(performance)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(report)
library(interactions)
```

## Data Preprocessing
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
df <- read_xlsx("data/Study_2_Full_Data.xlsx")
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Define Variables and Factor Levels
rename_vars <- c(
  "Pre_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy",
  "Pre_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy",
  "Pre_AI_Trust",
  "Pre_AI_Usefulness",
  "Pre_AI_Affect",
  "Pre_AI_Self_Efficacy",
  "Pre_Behavioral_Intention",
  "stage1_task0_accuracy",
  "stage1_task1_accuracy",
  "stage1_task2_accuracy",
  "stage1_task3_accuracy",
  "stage2_task0_accuracy",
  "stage2_task1_accuracy",
  "stage2_task2_accuracy",
  "stage2_task3_accuracy",
  "stage3_task0_accuracy",
  "stage3_task1_accuracy",
  "stage3_task2_accuracy",
  "stage3_task3_accuracy",
  "stage1_task0_confidence",
  "stage1_task1_confidence",
  "stage1_task2_confidence",
  "stage1_task3_confidence",
  "stage2_task0_confidence",
  "stage2_task1_confidence",
  "stage2_task2_confidence",
  "stage2_task3_confidence",
  "stage3_task0_confidence",
  "stage3_task1_confidence",
  "stage3_task2_confidence",
  "stage3_task3_confidence",
  "stage2_task0_willing",
  "stage2_task1_willing",
  "stage2_task2_willing",
  "stage2_task3_willing",
  "stage3_task0_willing",
  "stage3_task1_willing",
  "stage3_task2_willing",
  "stage3_task3_willing",
  "stage2_task0_useful",
  "stage2_task1_useful",
  "stage2_task2_useful",
  "stage2_task3_useful",
  "stage3_task0_useful",
  "stage3_task1_useful",
  "stage3_task2_useful",
  "stage3_task3_useful",
  "Post_AI_Trust",
  "Post_AI_Usefulness",
  "Post_AI_Affect",
  "Post_Behavioral_Intention"
)

df$Label <- factor(df$Label, levels = c("AI", "AI Human", "Human"))
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Check Distribution
ggplot(df, aes(x = stage1_task0_accuracy)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  stat_bin(binwidth = 0.05, geom = "text", aes(label = ..count..), vjust = -0.3) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.05),
    labels = sprintf("%.2f", seq(0, 1, by = 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of stage1_task0_accuracy",
    x = "stage1_task0_accuracy",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Filter Out stage1_task0_accuracy >= 0.9
Count <- sum(df$stage1_task0_accuracy >= 0.9)
Count

df <- df %>%
  filter(stage1_task0_accuracy < 0.9)
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Recode Background and LLM Usage
df$Stats_Background <- cut(
  as.numeric(as.character(df$Stats_Background)),
  breaks = c(1, 3, 5, 8),
  labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  right = TRUE,
  include.lowest = TRUE
)

df$Used_LLM_Frequency <- forcats::fct_collapse(
  as.character(df$Used_LLM_Frequency),
  Rarely = c("Never", "Less than once a month", "1–3 times per month"),
  Often  = c("Weekly", "Daily")
)

df$Used_LLM_Hours <- forcats::fct_collapse(
  as.character(df$Used_LLM_Hours),
  None = "0",
  Low  = c("1–5", "6–10"),
  High = c("11–20", ">20")
)
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
summary(df$Label)
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
# Convert To Longer Table
cols_to_long <- grep("^(Pre|Post|stage\\d+|follow)_", colnames(df), value = TRUE)

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(cols_to_long),
    names_to = "fullvar",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Phase = str_extract(fullvar, "^(Pre|Post|stage\\d+|follow)"),
    tmp = str_remove(fullvar, "^(Pre|Post|stage\\d+|follow)_"),
    task = ifelse(str_detect(tmp, "^task\\d+"), str_extract(tmp, "^task\\d+"), NA),
    measure = ifelse(!is.na(task), str_remove(tmp, "^task\\d+_"), tmp),
    tmp = NULL,
    fullvar = NULL
  )

df_long$Phase <- factor(df_long$Phase, levels = c("follow", "Post", "stage3", "stage2", "stage1", "Pre"))
df_long$Task <- as.factor(df_long$task)

df_long <- df_long %>%
  dplyr::select(-task)

df_long$Label <- as.factor(df_long$Label)
df_long$ID <- as.factor(df_long$ID)

head(df_long)
```

## H1
### Descriptive
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
performance_long <- df_long %>%
  rename(Measure = measure) %>%
  filter(
    Measure == "accuracy",
    Task != "task0"
  )

head(performance_long)
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
performance_long$Label <- as.factor(performance_long$Label)
performance_long$Phase <- as.factor(performance_long$Phase)
performance_long$Task <- as.factor(performance_long$Task)

stage_summary <- performance_long %>%
  group_by(Phase, Label) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = round(mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD = round(sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    N = n()
  )

head(stage_summary)
```

### LMM
#### Without Task
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
follow_up_stage <- c("stage1", "stage2", "stage3", "follow")

performance_long1 <- performance_long %>%
  filter(Phase %in% follow_up_stage)

performance_long1$Phase <- factor(performance_long1$Phase, levels = c("follow", "stage3", "stage2", "stage1"))

model <- lmer(
  Value ~ Phase * Label + Age + Gender + Field + Used_LLM_Hours +
    (1 | ID) + (1 | Task) + (1 | ID:Task),
  data = performance_long1
)

cat("===LMM MODEL SUM===\n")
model_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
print(model_summary)

anova_results <- anova(model)
cat("\n===ANOVA===\n")
print(anova_results)

eta_sq <- effectsize::eta_squared(model, partial = TRUE)
cat("\n===ETA SQUARED===\n")
print(eta_sq)

posthoc_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase)
cat("\n===POST HOC STAGE===\n")
print(posthoc_stage$contrasts)

posthoc_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label)
cat("\n===POST HOC LABEL===\n")
print(posthoc_label$contrasts)

posthoc_stage_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase | Label)
cat("\n===POST HOC PHASE X LABEL===\n")
print(posthoc_stage_label$contrasts)

posthoc_label_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label | Phase)
cat("\n===POST HOC LABEL X PHASE===\n")
print(posthoc_label_stage$contrasts)
```

#### With Task
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
follow_up_stage <- c("stage1", "stage2", "stage3", "follow")

performance_long1 <- performance_long %>%
  filter(Phase %in% follow_up_stage)

performance_long1$Phase <- factor(performance_long1$Phase, levels = c("follow", "stage3", "stage2", "stage1"))

model <- lmer(
  Value ~ Phase * Label * Task + Age + Gender + Field + Used_LLM_Hours +
    (1 | ID) + (1 | ID:Task),
  data = performance_long1
)

cat("===LMM MODEL SUM===\n")
model_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients

anova_results <- anova(model)
cat("\n===ANOVA===\n")
print(anova_results)

eta_sq <- effectsize::eta_squared(model, partial = TRUE)
cat("\n===ETA SQUARED===\n")
print(eta_sq)

posthoc_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase)
cat("\n===POST HOC STAGE===\n")
print(posthoc_stage$contrasts)

posthoc_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Task)
cat("\n===POST HOC Task===\n")
print(posthoc_label$contrasts)

posthoc_stage_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase | Task)
cat("\n===POST HOC PHASE X Task===\n")
print(posthoc_stage_label$contrasts)

posthoc_stage_task_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase | Task | Label)
cat("\n===POST HOC PHASE X Task X Label===\n")
print(posthoc_stage_task_label$contrasts)
```

## H2
### Confidence
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
confidence_long <- df_long %>%
  filter(
    measure == "confidence",
    Task != "task0"
  )
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
follow_up_stage <- c("stage1", "stage2", "stage3", "follow")

confidence_long1 <- confidence_long %>%
  filter(Phase %in% follow_up_stage)

confidence_long1$Phase <- factor(confidence_long1$Phase, levels = c("follow", "stage3", "stage2", "stage1"))

model <- lmer(
  Value ~ Phase * Label + Age + Gender + Field + Used_LLM_Hours +
    (1 | ID) + (1 | Task) + (1 | ID:Task),
  data = confidence_long1
)

cat("===LMM MODEL SUM===\n")
model_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients

anova_results <- anova(model)
cat("\n===ANOVA===\n")
print(anova_results)

eta_sq <- effectsize::eta_squared(model, partial = TRUE)
cat("\n===ETA SQUARED===\n")
print(eta_sq)

posthoc_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase)
cat("\n===POST HOC STAGE===\n")
print(posthoc_stage$contrasts)

posthoc_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label)
cat("\n===POST HOC LABEL===\n")
print(posthoc_label$contrasts)

posthoc_stage_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase | Label)
cat("\n===POST HOC PHASE X LABEL===\n")
print(posthoc_stage_label$contrasts)

posthoc_label_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label | Phase)
cat("\n===POST HOC LABEL X STAGE===\n")
print(posthoc_label_stage$contrasts)
```

### Attitude Change Over Time
#### Pre, Followup
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
measures <- c("GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy", "AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy", "AI_Self_Efficacy")

change_stats <- list()
anova_results <- list()
eta_squared_results <- list()
posthoc_results_stage <- list()
posthoc_results_PL <- list()
posthoc_results_LP <- list()

for (msr in measures) {
  d_sub <- df_long %>%
    filter(measure == msr, Phase %in% c("Pre", "follow")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-Task)

  d_wide <- d_sub %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Label, Phase, Value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Phase, values_from = Value) %>%
    mutate(change = follow - Pre)

  stat_tab <- d_wide %>%
    group_by(Label) %>%
    summarise(
      MeanChange = round(mean(change, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
      SD = round(sd(change, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
      N = n()
    ) %>%
    mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

  change_stats[[msr]] <- stat_tab

  d_mod <- d_sub %>%
    filter(!is.na(Value))

  if (nrow(d_mod) > 0) {
    d_mod$Phase <- factor(d_mod$Phase, levels = c("follow", "Pre"))
    d_mod$Phase <- relevel(as.factor(d_mod$Phase), ref = "follow")

    model <- lmer(
      Value ~ Phase * Label + Age + Gender + Field + Used_LLM_Hours + (1 | ID),
      data = d_mod
    )

    print(msr)

    aov_tab <- anova(model)
    cat("\n===ANOVA===\n")
    print(aov_tab)

    eta <- effectsize::eta_squared(model, partial = TRUE)
    cat("\n===Eta Squared===\n")
    print(eta)

    posthoc_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase)
    cat("\n===Post-Hoc Phase===\n")
    print(posthoc_stage)

    posthoc_label <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label)
    cat("\n===Post-Hoc Label===\n")
    print(posthoc_label)

    posthoc_PL <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase | Label)
    posthoc_LP <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label | Phase)

    anova_results[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(aov_tab) %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    eta_squared_results[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(eta) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    posthoc_results_stage[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(posthoc_stage$contrasts) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    posthoc_results_PL[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(posthoc_PL$contrasts) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    posthoc_results_LP[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(posthoc_LP$contrasts) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)
  }
}
```

#### Pre, Post, Followup
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
measures <- c("AI_Trust", "AI_Usefulness", "AI_Affect", "Behavioral_Intention")

change_stats <- list()
anova_results <- list()
eta_squared_results <- list()
posthoc_results_stage <- list()
posthoc_results_PL <- list()
posthoc_results_LP <- list()

for (msr in measures) {
  d_sub <- df_long %>%
    filter(measure == msr, Phase %in% c("Pre", "Post", "follow")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-Task)

  d_wide <- d_sub %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Label, Phase, Value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Phase, values_from = Value) %>%
    mutate(change = follow - Pre)

  stat_tab <- d_wide %>%
    group_by(Label) %>%
    summarise(
      MeanChange = round(mean(change, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
      SD = round(sd(change, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
      N = n()
    ) %>%
    mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

  change_stats[[msr]] <- stat_tab

  d_mod <- d_sub %>%
    filter(!is.na(Value))

  if (nrow(d_mod) > 0) {
    d_mod$Phase <- factor(d_mod$Phase, levels = c("follow", "Post", "Pre"))
    d_mod$Phase <- relevel(as.factor(d_mod$Phase), ref = "follow")

    model <- lmer(
      Value ~ Phase * Label + Age + Gender + Field + Used_LLM_Hours + (1 | ID),
      data = d_mod
    )

    cat("\n")
    print(msr)

    aov_tab <- anova(model)
    cat("\n===ANOVA===\n")
    print(aov_tab)

    eta <- effectsize::eta_squared(model, partial = TRUE)
    cat("\n===Eta Squared===\n")
    print(eta)

    posthoc_stage <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase)
    cat("\n===Post Hoc Phase===\n")
    print(posthoc_stage)

    posthoc_PL <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Phase | Label)
    posthoc_LP <- emmeans(model, pairwise ~ Label | Phase)

    anova_results[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(aov_tab) %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("Effect") %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    eta_squared_results[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(eta) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    posthoc_results_stage[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(posthoc_stage$contrasts) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    posthoc_results_PL[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(posthoc_PL$contrasts) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)

    posthoc_results_LP[[msr]] <- as.data.frame(posthoc_LP$contrasts) %>%
      mutate(Measure = msr, .before = 1)
  }
}
```
